Item.title: Item
Item.description: A lost or found item reported by a user.

type.description: Whether the item was lost or found.

title.description: A short title describing the item.

description.description: A detailed description of the item.

location.description: Where the item was lost or found.

date.description: When the item was lost or found.

status.description: The current status of the item.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who reported the item.

updatedAt.description: When the item was last updated.

/items/{itemId}.description: Stores reported lost and found items.
